name: 科学革命
subject: history
domain_name: 中世纪与近代早期 / Medieval & Early Modern / Medieval & Early Modern
curriculum_points: Analyze the origins and impact of the Scientific Revolution, including the development of the scientific method, the heliocentric model, and the resulting challenges to traditional religious and philosophical worldviews.
